summary: Config Tab Permissions Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified 'Pestañas de Configuracion' category with 14 config_* permissions visible in Permissions UI at Config → Usuarios → Edit User. Tested on Desktop 1280px (Dark/Light), Mobile iOS 390px, Android 412px.

issues: Console warning: nested button inside button in role selector (line 627-654) - accessibility issue but not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: UserConfig.js lines 96-116: PERMISSION_CATEGORIES correctly defines 'pestanas_config' category with all 14 config_* permissions
UserConfig.js lines 120-123: ROLE_DEFAULTS for admin correctly includes all permissions from all categories
SettingsContext.js lines 29-43: PERM_LABELS correctly defines all 14 config_* permission labels
auth.py lines 55-60: DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS for admin correctly includes all 14 config_* permissions
auth.py lines 123-136: ALL_PERMISSIONS correctly defines all 14 config_* permissions with Spanish labels
Minor: UserConfig.js has nested button inside button (edit role button inside role selector button) - causes React hydration warning
context_for_next_testing_agent: Config tab permissions feature fully implemented and tested. The 'Pestañas de Configuracion' category appears at the bottom of the permissions grid in UserConfig page. All 14 config_* permissions (config_users, config_mesas, config_ventas, config_productos, config_inventario, config_impresion, config_estacion, config_reportes, config_clientes, config_impuestos, config_ncf, config_apariencia, config_sistema, config_descuentos) are visible and enabled by default for admin role. UI works correctly on Desktop (1280px), Mobile iOS (390px), and Android (412px) viewports in both Dark and Light modes.

pestanas_config_category_visible.description: 'Pestañas de Configuracion' category appears in permissions grid with 14/14 badge

admin_role_default_permissions.description: Admin role has all 14 config_* permissions enabled by default

desktop_1280px_dark_mode.description: UI works correctly on Desktop 1280px in Dark Mode

desktop_1280px_light_mode.description: UI works correctly on Desktop 1280px in Light Mode

mobile_ios_390px.description: UI works correctly on Mobile Safari iOS viewport (390px)

android_412px.description: UI works correctly on Android Chrome viewport (412px)
